title: Universal Home Dual Compartment Hobby Craft Tool Box
description:
Are you sick of misplacing your hobby tools and crafting essentials? Then you need the Universal Home Dual Compartment ToolBox! Designed with tool organization and item storage in mind, this sturdy toolbox is ideal for all of your small tools and accessories. It measures 11.5" x 6" and is 4" deep, making it a great size for any workshop, crafting area or kitchen. It's constructed of durable, lightweight plastic and weighs just .6 pounds when empty, so you can easily transport your tools without being weighed down. This handy toolbox features dual compartments - one large compartment for tools like pliers, scissors, screwdrivers, rivets, tape measures and more, and a top compartment to organize smaller accessories like bolts, screws, nails, and nuts

Universal Home Dual Compartment Hobby Craft Tool Box

Are you sick of misplacing your hobby tools and crafting essentials? Then you need the Universal Home Dual Compartment ToolBox!

Key Features

  • DUAL COMPARTMENT STORAGE - Large Main Compartment for Tools | Top Compartment for Smaller Accessories and Essentials
  • DURABLE, LIGHTWEIGHT CONSTRUCTION - Made of Sturdy High-quality Plastic | Weighs Just .6lbs When Empty for Easy Transportation
  • COMPACT DESIGN - Measures 11.5" x 6" and 4" Deep - Ideal for Small Tools Like Scissors, Screwdrivers, Pliers, Tape Measures, Rivets and More
  • SNAP LOCK CLOSURE - Clasps Lock Both Compartments to Ensure Organization and Safe Travel | Flexible Opening and Closing
  • TOP CARRY HANDLE - Bright Yellow Carry Handle Easy to Spot and Locate | Great for Workshops, Craft Rooms, and Kitchens

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UHCHTB-1
  • UPC: 159855411001
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 11.5 in x 6 in x 4 in

Designed with tool organization and item storage in mind, this sturdy toolbox is ideal for all of your small tools and accessories. It measures 11.5" x 6" and is 4" deep, making it a great size for any workshop, crafting area or kitchen. It's constructed of durable, lightweight plastic and weighs just .6 pounds when empty, so you can easily transport your tools without being weighed down.

This handy toolbox features dual compartments - one large compartment for tools like pliers, scissors, screwdrivers, rivets, tape measures and more, and a top compartment to organize smaller accessories like bolts, screws, nails, and nuts. The top compartment comes with 4 different inner compartments that will keep your small essentials organized.

The top of the toolbox comes with a bright yellow colored clasp and carry handle for easy transportation, and the bright color will make the box easy to locate among your other tools. The stable locking clasps ensure that your tools and supplies will remain safe and organized during transportation and provide flexible opening and closing when in use. This is a must-have hobby toolbox for any crafter, hobbyist or DIYer!
